productDisplayName: Clarks Men Formal Black Formal Shoe
description: Capture the semi-casual yet sophisticated mood of the moment with clarks' stylish sandals. Wear this to transform your everyday wear into a look of understated sophistication. Upper Synthetic leather upper with thong straps for enhanced durability and comfort Fabric toe separator for absolute grip Synthetic woven lining below the thong straps for abrasion-free comfort Mildly padded footbed with stitch detailing and branding in print Synthetic leather footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for grip and traction Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
